Function.Name: Uprate
Function.Comment: Define uprating factors applied to monetary variables

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Standard disposable income (not accounting for own produce) (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Disposable income taking into account in-kind benefits

Function.Name: DefTu
Function.Comment: Define tax unit - OECD Household definition

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: All members of the household belong to one unit

Parameter.Name: Members
Parameter.Comment: Specify members of the family unit

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: Each member of the household forms own unit

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

Parameter.Name: PartnerCond
Parameter.Comment: Default = head: idperson=idpartner i.e., one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Set earnings at least at the level of minimum wage

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Those with positive registered employment earnings

Policy.Name: neg_pe
Policy.Comment: DEF: RECODE NEGATIVE INCOMES TO ZERO

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Recode negative employment income to zero

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Recode negative self-employment income to zero

Policy.Name: tscer_pe
Policy.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions of Employers Health

Policy.Name: bsa_pe
Policy.Comment: BEN: Social Assistance Conditional Cash Transfer (Juntos)

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Be eligible to Juntos and be poor by the poverty index

Policy.Name: tscee_pe
Policy.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions Employee Pension

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Conditional if contributes to Public Retirement PLan

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Conditional if contributes to Private Retirement PLan

Policy.Name: tscse_pe
Policy.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions Self-Employed Health

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Identify those eligible to pay self-employed contributions

Parameter.Name: $bot01
Parameter.Comment: Transfer Bono me quedo en casa - amount

Parameter.Name: $bsaoa
Parameter.Comment: Social Assistance for old age - amount

Parameter.Name: $bsa
Parameter.Comment: Social Assistance conditional cash transfer - amount

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Age>=65, be poor by the poverty index, not have health insurance and not be affiliated to a pension fund

Policy.Name: bot01_pe
Policy.Comment: BEN: Stay at Home Bonus (Bono me quedo en casa)

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligibility includes a threshold for the random number to match the number of hosueholds who received the benefit (69968 households)

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Receive bsa_s or bsaoa_s or be poor but earn less than 3000 soles

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Indirect taxes (“part of indirect taxes” in Statistics Presenter)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Social security contributions (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Child benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Social assistance benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Parameter.Name: bsa_s
Parameter.Comment: BEN: Social Assistance Conditional Cash Transfer

Parameter.Name: bot01_s
Parameter.Comment: BEN: Bono me quedo en casa

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Orphan/widows benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Disability benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Unemployment benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Agricultural benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Post-fiscal income taking into account own produce

Parameter.Name: ils_dispyx
Parameter.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Simulated consumption (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Indirect subsidies (“Indirect subsidies” in Statistics Presenter)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Standard rated items for VAT purposes

Parameter.Name: Name
Parameter.Comment: Standard rated items for VAT purposes

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: Recover the tax amount from the final expenditure under a 18% tax rate

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Nationally used equivalence scale: Per capita equivalence scale (number of household members)

Policy.Name: xhhadj_pe
Policy.Comment: DEF: Adjust consumption to new disposable income

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Disposable income higher than in base year (or the same)

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: ... increase by change in disposable income

Parameter.Name: Output_Var
Parameter.Comment: Assign to variable of simulated consumption

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Disposable income smaller than in base year

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: ... decrease by change in disposable income

Function.Name: DefConst
Function.Comment: Specify share of own-production consumed that is protected from changes

Parameter.Name: $protect_cons
Parameter.Comment: Constant share of own-account production consumed that is protected from the shock

Function.Name: Uprate
Function.Comment: Define uprating factors applied to monetary variables

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Standard disposable income (not accounting for own produce) (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Disposable income taking into account in-kind benefits

Function.Name: DefTu
Function.Comment: Define tax unit - OECD Household definition

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: All members of the household belong to one unit

Parameter.Name: Members
Parameter.Comment: Specify members of the family unit

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: Each member of the household forms own unit

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

Parameter.Name: PartnerCond
Parameter.Comment: Default = head: idperson=idpartner i.e., one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Set earnings at least at the level of minimum wage

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Those with positive registered employment earnings

Policy.Name: neg_pe
Policy.Comment: DEF: RECODE NEGATIVE INCOMES TO ZERO

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Recode negative employment income to zero

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Recode negative self-employment income to zero

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond

Parameter.Comment: Eligibility includes a threshold for the random number to match the number of hosueholds who received the benefit (69968 households)

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Receive bsa_s or bsaoa_s or be poor but earn less than 3000 soles

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Indirect taxes (“part of indirect taxes” in Statistics Presenter)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Social security contributions (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Child benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Social assistance benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Parameter.Name: bsa_s
Parameter.Comment: BEN: Social Assistance Conditional Cash Transfer

Parameter.Name: bot01_s
Parameter.Comment: BEN: Bono me quedo en casa

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Orphan/widows benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Disability benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Unemployment benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Agricultural benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Post-fiscal income taking into account own produce

Parameter.Name: ils_dispyx
Parameter.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Simulated consumption (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Indirect subsidies (“Indirect subsidies” in Statistics Presenter)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Standard rated items for VAT purposes

Parameter.Name: Name
Parameter.Comment: Standard rated items for VAT purposes

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: Recover the tax amount from the final expenditure under a 18% tax rate

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Nationally used equivalence scale: Per capita equivalence scale (number of household members)

Policy.Name: xhhadj_pe
Policy.Comment: DEF: Adjust consumption to new disposable income

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Disposable income higher than in base year (or the same)

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: ... increase by change in disposable income

Parameter.Name: Output_Var
Parameter.Comment: Assign to variable of simulated consumption

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Disposable income smaller than in base year

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: ... decrease by change in disposable income

Function.Name: DefConst
Function.Comment: Specify share of own-production consumed that is protected from changes

Parameter.Name: $protect_cons
Parameter.Comment: Constant share of own-account production consumed that is protected from the shock

Function.Name: Uprate
Function.Comment: Define uprating factors applied to monetary variables

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Standard disposable income (not accounting for own produce) (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

Function.Name: DefIl
Function.Comment: Disposable income taking into account in-kind benefits

Function.Name: DefTu
Function.Comment: Define tax unit - OECD Household definition

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: All members of the household belong to one unit

Parameter.Name: Members
Parameter.Comment: Specify members of the family unit

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: Each member of the household forms own unit

Parameter.Name: Type
Parameter.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

Parameter.Name: PartnerCond
Parameter.Comment: Default = head: idperson=idpartner i.e., one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Set earnings at least at the level of minimum wage

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Those with positive registered employment earnings

Policy.Name: neg_pe
Policy.Comment: DEF: RECODE NEGATIVE INCOMES TO ZERO

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Recode negative employment income to zero

Function.Name: ArithOp
Function.Comment: Recode negative self-employment income to zero

Policy.Name: tscer_pe
Policy.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions of Employers Health

Policy.Name: bsa_pe
Policy.Comment: BEN: Social Assistance Conditional Cash Transfer (Juntos)

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Be eligible to Juntos and be poor by the poverty index

Policy.Name: tscee_pe
Policy.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions Employee Pension

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Conditional if contributes to Public Retirement PLan

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Conditional if contributes to Private Retirement PLan

Policy.Name: tscse_pe
Policy.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions Self-Employed Health

Function.Name: Elig
Function.Comment: Identify those eligible to pay self-employed contributions

Parameter.Name: $bot01
Parameter.Comment: Transfer Bono me quedo en casa - amount

Parameter.Name: $bsaoa
Parameter.Comment: Social Assistance for old age - amount

Parameter.Name: $bsa
Parameter.Comment: Social Assistance conditional cash transfer - amount

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Age>=65, be poor by the poverty index, not have health insurance and not be affiliated to a pension fund

Policy.Name: bot01_pe
Policy.Comment: BEN: Stay at Home Bonus (Bono me quedo en casa)

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligibility includes a threshold for the random number to match the number of hosueholds who received the benefit (69968 households)

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Receive bsa_s or bsaoa_s or be poor but earn less than 3000 soles
